creator: billf@chc-chimes.com
text:
On Fri, 9 Oct 1998, Sheldon Hearn wrote:

> --- patch-aa	1998/03/21 11:35:31	1.3
> +++ patch-aa	1998/10/09 11:51:13
> @@ -1,39 +1,26 @@
> ---- xzx.config.orig	Sun Feb  8 22:17:34 1998
> -+++ xzx.config	Sat Mar 21 19:02:51 1998
> -@@ -37,13 +37,13 @@
> - /* #define REGISTERED /**/
> - 
> - /* Where the configuraion files and ROM images are installed */
> --ZXLIBDIR = /usr/local/lib/xzx
> -+ZXLIBDIR = /usr/X11R6/lib/X11/xzx

I'm trying not to be an ass about this, but a simple
s#/usr/local/#${X11BASE}#g, is much better then hardcoding. sed is your
friend.

-  ph:(800)252.2421 x128 / bfumerol@computerhorizons.com - BF1560  -

	when taken in too large quantities" -Lord Dunsany
